items.title: [正面] Overall a pretty good game. Similar to "Slay the S...
items.summary:
Overall a pretty good game. Similar to "Slay the Spire", but with a team of 4 characters that each add to your basic deck, and getting add ons to those cards or relics that can change gameplay during each map / run.

Artwork is very nice and consistent. The characters you can recruit and creepy boss creatures in particular. The entire thing has a very good "Arkham Horror in London" kind of vibe. The music and sound are decent as well.

The English translation is automated, and although you can follow along easy enough on most things, keywords and proper nouns can bounce around between several versions which can be somewhat confusing (and sometimes hilarious). There is no english voiceover.

The game is free with gacha style elements for earning money. Many of the systems here are very similar to what you would see in Honkai: Star Rail where you get a solid amount of "free pulls", and can make consistent progress using free resources. You can set up multiple teams or focus heavily on one without spending a dime. There is a battle-pass style thing that speeds up progress, and getting multiple versions of a character unlock secondary passives similar to Star Rail. Of course that said there are plenty of folks whaling with fully OP built up characters that you can add via the friend list and use their characters as support as well. The game is primarily PvE so there is no real incentive for competition to spend money.

items.title: [正面] I think it's pretty ok
